title: Rail Yard Tracker - Import Cars System
description: Complete code for the Import Cars page and all related workflows

src/pages/track/[id]/import.tsx.description: Main Import Cars page component - handles paste, preview, duplicate detection, and batch import

src/lib/carImportParser.ts.description: Car ID parser - extracts and normalizes car IDs from CN paste data

src/contexts/AppContext.tsx (addCar func.description: Context function that adds a car to a track - called by the import system

parsing.description: Flexible car ID extraction from CN paste data

sections.name: Will Add
sections.description: New cars that will be added

sections.name: Unrecognized
sections.description: Lines that didn't match car ID pattern

modes.name: Add New Only
modes.description: Skips all duplicates, adds only new cars

modes.name: Review Duplicates
modes.description: Shows checklist to select which duplicates to include

userExperience.expandCollapse: Tap any car to see source verification
userExperience.errorHandling: Validates and categorizes all input lines

steps: extractCarIds() parses text and extracts cars
Preview shows three sections with counts
executeImport() calls addCar() for each car

stateManagement: expandedCars: Set<string> - Which cars are expanded
selectedDuplicates: Set<string> - User-selected duplicates to include
keyFunctions: handlePreview() - Parse text and show preview
handleConfirmClick() - Route to appropriate confirmation dialog

usage.navigation: From Track Detail page, tap the Upload FAB (bottom-left)
example: Tap any car in 'Will Add' to verify source
